basic_details.short_information: NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) has released the official Telecaller - Work From Home Recruitment 2026 notification at nabfins.org. A total of vacancies not specified have been announced under the NABFINS Telecaller Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 30 years with a qualification of PUC / 10+2 (completed) can apply through email/online mode from 24 June 2026 to the last date 01 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available through the official recruitment communication.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Telecaller-WFH: PUC/10+2 completed. Fresher's are eligible to apply.

selection_process: Calling existing and prospective customers from the provided database. Proper follow-up and maintain the conversation records. Understand customer concern
do proper analysis of customer concern to find out the reason and educate the customer.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NABFINS Telecaller-WFH Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NABFINS Telecaller-WFH Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NABFINS Telecaller-WFH Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NABFINS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NABFINS Telecaller-WFH Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NABFINS Telecaller-WFH Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Telecaller-WFH: PUC/10+2 completed. Fresher's are eligible to apply.

content_sections.heading: NABFINS Telecaller-WFH Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: NABFINS Telecaller-WFH Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Calling existing and prospective customers from the provided database. Proper follow-up and maintain the conversation records. Understand customer concern, do proper analysis of customer concern to find out the reason and educate the customer.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NABFINS Telecaller-WFH Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Telecaller-WFH.

faq.question: Q2. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) is conducting this recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for the Telecaller-WFH position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed PUC/10+2 to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q5. Are freshers eligible to apply for this role?
faq.answer: Yes, freshers are eligible to apply for the Telecaller-WFH position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 30 years.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their resume via email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Full Time.

faq.question: Q9. In which state is this job located?
faq.answer: This job is located in Kerala, Odisha, West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Madhya Pradesh, Bihar.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
